error_signature: 404 error from ngrok after first execution
title: Messenger webhook returns 404 after first execution
symptom: The Messenger automation workflow executes successfully once but returns a 404 error on subsequent messages. The workflow appears active but does not respond again.
applies_when: Running n8n in test mode with ngrok
root_cause: In test mode, n8n creates a temporary webhook that is only valid for a single execution. After the first successful execution, the webhook becomes inactive, leading to a 404 error for subsequent requests.
fix_steps: Switch the workflow toggle to ON in the n8n editor.
Update the Facebook Messenger app settings with the production webhook URL (without -test).
Re-run the subscription/verification step on Facebook if necessary.
agent_instruction: Switch to the production webhook URL and ensure the workflow is activated.
